betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Silicon Wafer§f is the §6foundation of every electronic circuit§f in the AR progression. It is produced in two stages: first §6Silicon Ingots§f are smelted in the §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004) from sand, then the ingots are grown into a §6Silicon Boule§f in the §6Crystallizer§f (10006), and the boule is sliced into wafers in the §6Cutting Machine§f (10008).

§6Production Path (siliconingot.json + siliconwafer.json)§f:
- Step 1 — §6Silicon Ingot§f (ingotSilicon, electric arc furnace):
  - Machine: §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004) at 12000 ticks
  - Input: 1x §6sand§f (minecraft:sand:0)
  - Output: 1x §6ingotSilicon§f
  - Energy: 1 RF/t
- Step 2 — §6Silicon Boule§f (bouleSilicon, crystallizer):
  - Machine: §6Crystallizer§f (10006) — recipe not in JSON, registered via libVulpes
  - Input: 1x §6ingotSilicon§f
  - Output: 1x §6Silicon Boule§f
  - Time: 1800 ticks
- Step 3 — §6Silicon Wafer§f (advancedrocketry:wafer:0, cutting machine):
  - Machine: §6Cutting Machine§f (10008) at 300 ticks
  - Input: 1x §6bouleSilicon§f
  - Output: 4x §6Silicon Wafer§f
  - Energy: 100 RF/t

The silicon wafer is the §6primary ingredient§f for every circuit plate recipe in AR. It is consumed by the §6Basic Circuit Plate§f (10056), §6Advanced Circuit Plate§f (10057), and the §6Integrated Circuit Plate§f (chain).

The silicon wafer is a prerequisite for the §6Basic Circuit Plate§f (10056) and the §6Satellite Builder§f (10039). It is one of the most resource-intensive ingredients in the AR progression because every circuit requires 1–4 wafers.

§eTip§f: The §6Silicon Ingot§f recipe is §6extremely slow§f (12000 ticks = 10 minutes per ingot). Build at least 3 §6Electric Arc Furnaces§f (10004) in parallel to keep up with downstream consumption. Use a §6Tier 3 Solar Generator§f (chain) to power them — they are §6low-power but long-running§f.
